deductions.name: RRSP Contributions
required_docs: RRSP contribution receipts from financial institution
deductions.deadline: 60 days after Dec 31 (end of Feb/early Mar)
deductions.notes: Contribution limit is 18% of prior year earned income minus pension adjustment

deductions.name: Child Care Expenses
required_docs: Receipts from daycare/babysitter with provider SIN or BN
deductions.notes: Must be claimed by lower-income spouse

deductions.name: Moving Expenses
deductions.notes: Only if moved 40+ km closer to new work/school. Form T1-M required.

deductions.name: Medical Expenses
deductions.notes: Must exceed 3% of net income or $2,635 (2024). 12-month period, not calendar year.

deductions.name: Charitable Donations
required_docs: Official donation receipts with CRA registration number
deductions.notes: First $200 at 15%, over $200 at 29% federal credit rate

deductions.name: Tuition Fees
deductions.notes: T2202 must be downloaded from institution's student portal

deductions.name: Home Office Expenses
deductions.notes: Temporary flat rate method ended 2022. Must use detailed method with T2200.

deductions.name: Employment Expenses
required_docs: T2200 Declaration of Conditions of Employment signed by employer
deductions.notes: Employer must certify you were required to pay expenses

deductions.name: Investment Carrying Charges
deductions.notes: Interest on money borrowed to earn investment income

deductions.name: Capital Gains/Losses
required_docs: ACB records for each security sold
deductions.notes: Keep records of adjusted cost base. Use CRA Schedule 3.

deductions.name: Disability Tax Credit
required_docs: Form T2201 certified by medical practitioner
deductions.notes: One-time application, approved by CRA. Transferable to supporting person.

deductions.name: First Home Buyers Amount
deductions.notes: $10,000 credit if you or spouse bought qualifying home and didn't own another in last 4 years

deductions.name: Canada Training Credit
required_docs: T2202 or other eligible tuition receipts
deductions.notes: Refundable credit, $250/year accumulation limit. Check My CRA Account for balance.

deductions.name: Union/Professional Dues
required_docs: Union receipts if not on T4
deductions.notes: Usually already on T4 Box 44. Additional dues not on T4 need receipts.

common_slips.T4A: Pension, retirement, annuity, and other income
common_slips.T3: Statement of Trust Income (mutual funds, ETFs)
